name: Daily OpenClaw System Map
description: Generates a comprehensive system map (agents, skills, bindings, cron jobs, memory, MCP servers, plugins, security, infrastructure) via the system-map Python collector and saves a timestamped markdown file to ~/shared/. Read-only.

payload.message:
Run the system map collector script. Execute this command and return only the output file path:

python3 ~/.openclaw/skills/system-map/scripts/system_map.py

Do NOT read the SKILL.md or attempt manual collection.
